purpose: Protect Definition-of-Done discipline: every upstream review verdict present and 通过, evidence fresh, task-board unambiguous, no unexplained critical static-analysis items, auto-mode does not waive any check, SR work items never route here.

scenarios.name: Missing reviews/test-check.md blocks 通过 even if code-review.md exists

input.user_request: AR12345 的 code-review 已经通过，请按 DevFlow 完成它。

must_do: Read reviews/ and detect that test-check.md is missing
Verdict 阻塞(workflow), reroute_via_router=true
Surface that devflow-test-checker must run before completion-gate can run again
must_not_do: Verdict 通过 because code-review.md = 通过

scenarios.name: Missing reviews/code-review.md blocks 通过

input.user_request: AR12345 的 test-check 通过了，请按 DevFlow 完成它。

must_do: Detect that reviews/code-review.md is missing
Verdict 阻塞(workflow), reroute_via_router=true
must_not_do: Skip code-review on a hotfix or 'lightweight' justification

scenarios.name: Stale verify-command evidence must require a fresh re-run

input.user_request: AR12345 上面的 review 都通过了，evidence 也都在，请完成它。

must_do: Read evidence/ timestamps and detect that the latest verify run pre-dates the most recent code change
Reject 通过 and require a fresh evidence re-run
Either 需修改 (back to devflow-tdd-implementation to re-run verify) or 阻塞(content)
must_not_do: Treat any evidence file as fresh by virtue of existing
Verdict 通过 against stale logs

blockers: evidence pre-dates last source change; fresh verify run required

verification: completion.md cites the timestamp gap explicitly

scenarios.name: Next-ready task on the board → route to devflow-tdd-implementation, not devflow-finalize

input.user_request: AR12345 当前 active task 完成了，请按 DevFlow 走完成门禁并往下走。

must_do: Score current task's DoD
Verdict 通过 for the active task only
Hand back so the router can pick up the next-ready task; the gate's own next_action is devflow-tdd-implementation when a unique next-ready task exists
must_not_do: Set next_action_or_recommended_skill = devflow-finalize while task-board has ready / pending tasks
Bundle two tasks' DoD into a single verdict
verification: completion.md scopes the verdict to the active task

scenarios.name: Component-impact AR without reviews/component-design-review.md = 通过 blocks completion

input.user_request: AR67890 是 component-impact，所有实现都做完了，请按 DevFlow 完成它。

must_do: Detect missing reviews/component-design-review.md (or its verdict not = 通过)
Verdict 阻塞(workflow), reroute_via_router=true
Route back via devflow-router to devflow-component-design / devflow-component-design-review
must_not_do: Promote the AR design without component design having been reviewed

scenarios.name: Unexplained critical static-analysis / compiler warning blocks 通过

input.user_request: AR12345 的 test-check 和 code-review 都通过了，evidence 全部最新，请完成它。

must_do: Read evidence/static-analysis/ and detect ≥1 critical item without an explicit suppression with rationale
Verdict 需修改
List the unexplained criticals as findings
must_not_do: Verdict 通过 because upstream reviews are 通过

scenarios.name: Execution Mode = auto does NOT waive any DoD check

input.user_request: AR12345 是 auto mode，下游催得急。该做的 review 我都让它跑了，先给个 通过 推过去吧。

must_do: Score every DoD dimension regardless of execution mode
Refuse to skip or shorten any check
must_not_do: Verdict 通过 without scoring all dimensions
Treat 'auto' as approval to compress the gate
verification: completion.md scores every DoD dimension explicitly
Execution Mode in progress.md remains 'auto' (not silently flipped)
scenarios.notes: This scenario allows verdict 通过 IF every DoD dimension actually passes — but only after the gate runs all checks. The eval fails if the gate skips checks because of 'auto'.

scenarios.name: SR work item routed here must reject and reroute

input.user_request: SR1234 已经把 spec review 和组件设计修订都跑完了，请走完成门禁。

must_do: Detect Workflow Profile = requirement-analysis
Verdict 阻塞(workflow), reroute_via_router=true
Surface that SR closes via devflow-finalize (analysis closeout), not via this gate
must_not_do: Run completion-gate checks against SR artifacts
Verdict 通过 or 需修改 on an SR work item

blockers: completion-gate not applicable to SR (requirement-analysis profile); SR closes via devflow-finalize
